allowed_verdicts.meaning: Proof objects moved materially, but alpha remains canonical and superiority is still unearned.
One or more fenced families prove route-bearing value or de-risking, but branch-level superiority is still unearned.
A learned-router candidate is signal-present but still blocked pending ordered proof and authorization law.
Residual alpha dominance remains the principal blocker preventing superiority.
The current lobe/family split is the blocker rather than insufficient pressure alone.
A tranche ran but did not move counted proof objects.
The result is void because lab and counted lanes were mixed unlawfully.
Router superiority is actually earned by ordered proof on the lawful substrate.

claim_boundary: This grammar constrains interpretation only. It does not move the counted lane by itself.
prohibited_readings: Do not narrate material advance as router superiority.
Do not treat lab-only crucible wins as counted-lane proof.
Do not treat learned-router-candidate signal as learned-router authorization.
Do not treat fenced-family route value as Gate E/F opening.
